summary: Two of North America's largest beef companies agree to settle class action

headline: Is Trending Stock Tyson Foods, Inc. (TSN) a Buy Now?

headline: What Analysts Really Pressed GIS On This Quarter
summary: After a year spent cutting prices, General Mills says it's time for an innovation push, but analysts on its latest call pressed on whether a squeezed consumer is ready to follow.
